title: Result of the USD/INR Buy/Sell Swap Auction, May 26, 2026
description: Today, the Reserve Bank conducted a USD/INR Buy/Sell swap auction for a notified amount of USD 5 billion as announced vide press release dated May 20, 2026. I. SUMMARY RESULTS Aggregate amount notified (USD billion) 5.00 Total amount bid by participants (USD billion) 9.80 Total amount accepted (USD billion) 5.00 Cut-off premium (in paisa) 910.00 II. OTHER DETAILS USD/INR Buy/Sell Swap auction No. of bids received 254 Bid to cover ratio 1.96 No. of bids accepted 141 Partial allotment as % of
